name: Conor McGregor
oneLiner: The iconic-moment case: Aldo in 13 seconds, Alvarez double-champ masterclass, unmatched UFC star power, and a short prime window.
compareShortCase: McGregor is the peak-star two-division case: featherweight takeover, Aldo knockout, lightweight title win, and a short UFC prime that hit harder culturally than almost anyone's.
compareCounter: The argument against Conor is volume: no title defenses, short prime window, and later losses that make the resume feel incomplete compared with the long-control champions.
